snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-44880 - Low-Privilege Authenticated Buffer Overflow"; content:"CVE-2026-44880"; nocase; sid:1209376; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 219 threat advisories. Of these, 15 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 93 as HIGH risk. 4 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-INGEST. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.

key_recommendations.impact: Reduces attack surface by eliminating highest-risk exposure vectors

key_recommendations.recommendation: Address 4 CISA KEV-listed vulnerabilities under active exploitation
Deploy auto-generated Sigma/YARA detection rules to SIEM/EDR
key_recommendations.impact: Provides layered detection coverage for identified TTPs

key_recommendations.recommendation: Conduct threat hunting exercises based on generated hunt hypotheses
key_recommendations.impact: Proactive identification of undetected compromise indicators

emulation_exercises.name: Emulation: UNC-CDB-INGEST Attack Simulation
emulation_exercises.objective: Validate detection and response capabilities against UNC-CDB-INGEST TTPs
success_criteria: Trigger automated alert within 15 minutes of execution
